channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A Practical Guide to Getting Fit in Midlife
Taking the heat. Sauna's popular and there may be health benefits too
item.description: It's an age old practice that's having a moment right now. But is there anything to the health claims? Scientists say sauna is more than hot air.

item.title: Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
Two Surprising Fruits That Boost Heart Health (Without Raising Blood Sugar)
item.description: Here's what researchers found when pairing avocado and mango

item.title: People Deficient In This Essential Vitamin Are At Higher Risk Of Depression
item.description: This nutrient delivers serious mood support.

item.title: 3 Brain-Boosting Ingredients To Your Morning Coffee, According To An RD
item.description: Try this if you want all day energy.

item.title: Medical schools agree to expand their nutrition curriculum this fall
item.description: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. announced that 53 medical schools in 31 states will expand their nutrition curriculum to 40 hours. Most medical...

item.title: In lawsuit, Minnesota accuses Trump administration of 'weaponizing' Medicaid funding
item.description: The federal government said the state should do more to fight fraud and is holding back funds. Minnesota officials say the attack is unfair as the sta...

item.title: Can a digital tablet cut back a country's overuse of antibiotics?
item.description: Overprescribing antibiotics breeds antibiotic resistance. A new tool aims to lower a notably high rate of such prescriptions in Rwanda.

item.title: Pregnant women in ERs took less Tylenol after Trump autism warning
item.description: A study in The Lancet finds that pregnant women in emergency rooms used less Tylenol after President Trump said it could raise their babies' risk of a...

item.title: New Study Links A Younger Biological Age To 23% Lower Stroke Risk
item.description: Your biological age isn't fixed, and that's good news for your brain health

item.title: This Sleep Factor Matters More Than Actual Sleep Quality, Study Says
item.description: And it can impact your mood the next day.
